description: You are an OLPC deployment coordinator teaching 8th graders programming using real-world health data. Using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/nutrition_data.csv (Columns: Food_Item, Calories_kcal, Protein_g, Iron_mg, Vitamin_C_mg), write and execute a Python script saved to /home/ga/Documents/nutrition_analyzer.py to analyze the data. The script must identify High Iron Foods (>= 2.5 mg), High Vitamin C Foods (>= 25.0 mg), and High Protein Foods (>= 15.0 g), and calculate the average protein content across all items rounded to 2 decimal places. Generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/nutrition_report.txt containing the headers '=== HIGH IRON FOODS ===', '=== HIGH VITAMIN C FOODS ===', '=== HIGH PROTEIN FOODS ===', and '=== DATASET STATISTICS ==='. List the food names under their respective headers and include the average protein (formatted as 'Average Protein: [value] g') under the statistics header.
